############################################################
# P0 ARRAY wire-decoder spike -- RAW OUTPUT (throwaway evidence)
# Doris 4.1.3 (doris-4.1.3-rc02-7126cf65d96) via MySQL Connector/J 9.7.0
# JVM OpenJDK 21.0.2. Cluster: trino-doris-fe, mysql 127.0.0.1:9130.
# Generated by: ArrayWireDecoder-spike.java + Harness (see below).
############################################################

===== PART A: byte-level escaping proof (BytesProbe) =====
# ARRAY<VARCHAR> getString() vs scalar VARCHAR getString(), hex bytes.
# Proves Doris does NOT escape " \ , newline tab inside quoted array elements.
id=1
  av.getString bytes = 5B22686173226471225D   (["has"dq"])
  sv.getString bytes = 686173226471   (has"dq)
id=2
  av.getString bytes = 5B226261636B5C736C617368225D   (["back\slash"])
  sv.getString bytes = 6261636B5C736C617368   (back\slash)
id=3
  av.getString bytes = 5B22612C62225D   (["a,b"])
  sv.getString bytes = 612C62   (a,b)
id=4
  av.getString bytes = 5B226E65776C696E650A68657265225D   (["newline
here"])
  sv.getString bytes = 6E65776C696E650A68657265   (newline
here)
id=5
  av.getString bytes = 5B227461620968657265225D   (["tab	here"])
  sv.getString bytes = 7461620968657265   (tab	here)

===== PART B: proven ambiguity (2 rows, byte-identical wire) =====
1	1	["a", "b"]	5B2261222C202262225D
2	2	["a", "b"]	5B2261222C202262225D
# row1 = single element value  a", "b   (array_size 1);  row2 = two elements a,b (array_size 2)
# -> byte-identical wire 5B2261222C202262225D  ->  UNPARSEABLE without the oracle.

===== PART C: full fixture wire-text dump (WireDump) =====

===== PART D: decoder-vs-oracle harness run (Harness) =====
=== P0 ARRAY wire-decoder spike run ===
Connector/J: 9.7.0
JVM: 21.0.2

##### TABLE num #####

##### TABLE nested #####

##### TABLE iparr #####

##### TABLE strs #####
AMBIGUOUS-STRING strs.a_vc[id=18]: decoder disagrees with oracle
   wire   = "[\"a\", \"b\"]"  (hex=5B2261222C202262225D)
   oracle array_size=1  decoder size=2
  elem[1] oracle="a\", \"b" (hex=61222C202262) decoded="a"
AMBIGUOUS-STRING strs.a_vc[id=31]: decoder disagrees with oracle
   wire   = "[\"x\", \"y\", \"real2\"]"  (hex=5B2278222C202279222C20227265616C32225D)
   oracle array_size=2  decoder size=3
  elem[1] oracle="x\", \"y" (hex=78222C202279) decoded="x"
  elem[2] oracle="real2" (hex=7265616C32) decoded="y"
FAIL strs.a_vc[id=33]: decoder threw: unterminated quoted element (no closing '"') (at wire offset 13)  wire=["trailing", "]
AMBIGUOUS-STRING strs.a_str[id=18]: decoder disagrees with oracle
   wire   = "[\"a\", \"b\"]"  (hex=5B2261222C202262225D)
   oracle array_size=1  decoder size=2
  elem[1] oracle="a\", \"b" (hex=61222C202262) decoded="a"
AMBIGUOUS-STRING strs.a_str[id=31]: decoder disagrees with oracle
   wire   = "[\"x\", \"y\", \"real2\"]"  (hex=5B2278222C202279222C20227265616C32225D)
   oracle array_size=2  decoder size=3
  elem[1] oracle="x\", \"y" (hex=78222C202279) decoded="x"
  elem[2] oracle="real2" (hex=7265616C32) decoded="y"
FAIL strs.a_str[id=33]: decoder threw: unterminated quoted element (no closing '"') (at wire offset 13)  wire=["trailing", "]

##### TABLE longstr #####

##### EXTRA PROBES #####
getObject(ARRAY<INT>) class = java.lang.String  value=[1]
RSMD columnClassName=java.lang.String typeName=CHAR type=1
ARRAY<DATETIME(6)> getString = ["2021-06-15 12:34:56.789012"]  (micros kept? -> see .789012)
ARRAY<DECIMAL(9,2)> getString = [1.10]  (trailing zeros/scale kept?)
SELECT ARRAY(NULL,NULL) getString = [null, null]  RSMD typeName=CHAR
distinction a_int getString="[1, null, 3]" (hex=5B312C206E756C6C2C20335D)
distinction a_int getString="[]" (hex=5B5D)
distinction a_int getString=<null> (hex=<null>)

##### MALFORMED INPUT BATTERY (must fail loud) #####
OK fail-loud: truncated: missing ]  -> unterminated array (EOF before ']') (at wire offset 5)
OK fail-loud: missing leading [  -> expected '[' to open array (at wire offset 0)
OK fail-loud: separator ',' without space  -> separator ',' not followed by space (at wire offset 2)
OK fail-loud: trailing space garbage  -> trailing garbage after array: ' ' (at wire offset 6)
OK fail-loud: empty element  -> empty bare token (at wire offset 4)
OK fail-loud: non-numeric INT token  -> malformed INT token 'abc': For input string: "abc" (at wire offset 1)
OK fail-loud: TINYINT overflow  -> TINYINT out of range: 999 (at wire offset 1)
OK fail-loud: BOOLEAN not 1/0 (2), then true  -> BOOLEAN element not 1/0: '2' (at wire offset 1)
OK fail-loud(DateTimeParseException): impossible DATE  -> Text '2021-13-99' could not be parsed: Invalid value for MonthOfYear (valid values 1 - 12): 13
OK fail-loud: unterminated quote  -> unterminated quoted element (no closing '"') (at wire offset 1)
OK fail-loud: interior quote in DATE alphabet  -> interior '"' in a DATE element (alphabet violation) (at wire offset 3)
OK fail-loud: truncated after null  -> unterminated array (EOF before ']') (at wire offset 5)

=== TOTALS === pass=179 fail=2 ambiguous-string-findings=4
